step_rationale: Eicosanoid signaling intermediate; activates leukocyte and myocardial injury in AMI.
mechanism: 5-oxo-ETE is an arachidonic-acid-derived eicosanoid that promotes leukocyte infiltration and myocardial injury during acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Oxoeicosanoid receptor inhibition alleviates acute myocardial infarction through activation of BCAT1.
